sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45608" key="e)faplwte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφαπλ-ωτέον</orth>, <sense id="n45608.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must spread over</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κατά τινων ὀθόνιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
